channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump task force seizes Ferraris and jewelry in $6.5 billion healthcare fraud crackdown
item.description: Officials announced Tuesday they uncovered $6.5 billion in fraudulent claims against Medicare, Medicaid and other federal programs.

item.title: America Is a Choice
item.description: Freedom is always just one generation from extinction. Let’s keep it going together.

item.title: Keir Starmer Deserved His Fall
item.description: The government he led engaged in class warfare of the most spiteful kind.

item.title: MLB Commissioner Denies League’s Left-Wing Activism in Letter to Hawley
item.description: MLB Commissioner Robert D. Manfred claims neutrality to Sen. Hawley, but evidence suggests otherwise.
